name: Documentation Issue
about: Report documentation problems or suggest improvements

---

## Documentation Issue

Describe the documentation problem or improvement suggestion.

## Location

Which file(s) are affected?
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] docs/METHODOLOGY.md
- [ ] docs/FIGURE_DESCRIPTION.md
- [ ] Code docstrings
- [ ] Other: [specify]

## Issue Type

- [ ] Typo or grammatical error
- [ ] Unclear explanation
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Formatting issue
- [ ] Missing references

## Current Content

Quote the current content that needs improvement (if applicable).

## Suggested Improvement

Describe or provide the improved content.

## Additional Context

Add any other context or references here.
